title: EndfieldPanorama
description: Brings loading screen from "Arknight: Endfield" to Minecraft
body:
# About
**EndfieldPanorama** takes the highly designed game loading pages from _Arknight: Endfield_ and ports them to Minecraft. This mod replaces the backgrounds of the game loading screen and main menu with a configurable scene.

This mod consists of two jars (the mod itself and EndfieldEarlywindowModule). This means you need to download them separately and place them in the "mods" directory.

Users can customize the background's panoramic image (skybox) and character animations by modifying the contents in the "assets/endfield_panorama/..." directory located in the corresponding running directory.

Caution: This mod is still in the development stage. Some features have not been completed yet, and there may be potential memory leak bugs. If you experience crashes or other issues, please open an [issue in GitHub](https://github.com/LouisQuepierts/EndfieldPanorama/issues)
